message: Node started: Find the smallest prime p such that there exists an integer n where n^4 + 1 is divisible by p^2. To do this, check primes p starting from 2. For each p, check if there is an integer n in the range 1 to p-1 such that n^4 + 1 is divisible by p. If such an n exists, check if n^4 + 1 is also divisible by p^2. Return the smallest such prime p.
